description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named ci-build that triggers on push to the master branch and on pull requests to master, excluding certain paths. The workflow should have three jobs: coverage, build, and build-windows. The coverage job should run on ubuntu-latest, install dependencies, configure, and run tests. The build job should also run on ubuntu-latest, install dependencies, configure, and build the project. The build-windows job should run on windows-latest, set up MSYS2, install dependencies, configure, build, and package the project for distribution.
